Together we can #stopoverdoses Learn more at Canada.ca/opioids
This figure may change as more updated data become available. Differences remain between provinces and territories on how deaths are counted and reported.
British Columbia reports unintentional deaths related to all illicit drugs including, but not limited to, opioids.
